_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to evaluate if patches are up to date for all hosts, determine current process for updating patches and determine current patch level for all hosts on a network according to NIST Special Publications 800-40 in support of identifying outliers in order to delineate possible avenues of approach.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to diagnose and resolve technical issues that span multiple system layers, tracing problems across application code, data pipelines, databases, networks, and infrastructure to identify and remediate root causes.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI TF domain. TF-A-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-T-007 (DG, cosine: 0.447), AI-T-017 (AI, cosine: 0.423).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.0/10 (raw 0.505). Shared vocabulary: [ability]. DCWF-only terms [40, 800, according, approach, avenues, current] vs WIDAI-only terms [across, application, causes, code, data, databases] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.847 (P=0.836, R=0.858). R exceeds P by 0.021 — the WIDAI KSA's 29 words are well-captured by the DCWF element's 48 words, but the DCWF element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.2%). "Ability to evaluate if patches are up to date for all hosts, determine current p" and "Ability to diagnose and resolve technical issues that span multiple system layer" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.468 ≈ STS 0.505 (gap 0.038). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [ability] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 5.0%. Shared tokens: [ability]. DCWF-only: [40, 800, according, approach, avenues, current]. WIDAI-only: [across, application, causes, code, data, databases].
